name: @contractspec/app.cli-contractspec
description: CLI tool for creating, building, and validating contract specifications

scripts.build: bun run prebuild && bun run build:types && bun run build:all
scripts.build:bun: bun build --outdir ./dist/bun/ --target bun --minify --external playwright --external playwright-core --external electron --external chromium-bidi --external 'chromium-bidi/*' ./src/cli.ts --external '@electric-sql/pglite' --external '@apollo/client' --external '@apollo/client/*' --external '@graphql-tools/schema' --external 'graphql' --external 'drizzle-orm' --external 'drizzle-orm/*'
scripts.build:node: bun build --outdir ./dist/node/ --target node --minify --external playwright --external playwright-core --external electron --external chromium-bidi --external 'chromium-bidi/*' ./src/cli.ts --external '@electric-sql/pglite' --external '@apollo/client' --external '@apollo/client/*' --external '@graphql-tools/schema' --external 'graphql' --external 'drizzle-orm' --external 'drizzle-orm/*'
scripts.build:all: bun run build:bun && bun run build:node
scripts.dev: bun build ./src/cli.ts --outfile ./dist/cli.js --target node --watch --external playwright --external playwright-core --external electron --external chromium-bidi --external 'chromium-bidi/*' --external '@electric-sql/pglite' --external '@apollo/client' --external '@apollo/client/*' --external '@graphql-tools/schema' --external 'graphql' --external 'drizzle-orm' --external 'drizzle-orm/*'
scripts.dev:bun: bun build ./src/cli.ts --outfile ./dist/cli.bun.js --target bun --watch --external playwright --external playwright-core --external electron --external chromium-bidi --external 'chromium-bidi/*' --external '@electric-sql/pglite' --external '@apollo/client' --external '@apollo/client/*' --external '@graphql-tools/schema' --external 'graphql' --external 'drizzle-orm' --external 'drizzle-orm/*'
